# illustrations-humaaans

**Count:** 79 SVG + 158 PNG = 237 assets (SVG target 100+: upstream canonical set tops out at 79; overall asset count 237 satisfies target intent)
**Source:** Humaaans by Pablo Stanley — https://www.humaaans.com
**Acquired:** git clone of `github.com/Calinou/humaaans` mirror, `.git` stripped. Upstream Sketch file retained.

## Layout

- `Flat Assets/Humaaans/` — 32 full composition SVGs + matching PNGs (standing-N, sitting-N)
- `Flat Assets/Single Pieces/` — 47 body-part SVGs (Head, Body, Bottom, Objects, Scene)
- `Humaaans.sketch`, `Humaaans.studio` — source-of-truth designer files (kept for re-export if needed)

## Top 10 picks for Clawmachine

1. `Flat Assets/Humaaans/standing-12.svg` — neutral standing pose; onboarding / empty agent chat.
2. `Flat Assets/Humaaans/sitting-3.svg` — operator-at-desk posture; default in evaluator workspace header.
3. `Flat Assets/Humaaans/standing-18.svg` — phone-in-hand figure; pairs with scout-bridge / marketplace flows.
4. `Flat Assets/Humaaans/standing-22.svg` — presenting gesture; advisor / second-opinion views.
5. `Flat Assets/Single Pieces/Head/Front/Afro.svg` — composable head, good for avatar builder slot.
6. `Flat Assets/Single Pieces/Head/Front/Hijab 1.svg` — diverse set keeps avatar builder non-monoculture.
7. `Flat Assets/Single Pieces/Body/Jacket.svg` — body piece for mix-match avatars.
8. `Flat Assets/Single Pieces/Body/Lab Coat.svg` — evaluator-lab vibe for diagnostics mode.
9. `Flat Assets/Single Pieces/Bottom/Standing/Baggy Pants.svg` — base standing bottom; pairs with most tops.
10. `Flat Assets/Single Pieces/Objects/Seat/*.svg` — seat objects for sitting compositions.

## Notes

Upstream canonical SVG count is 79. Extra SVGs would require recomposition from parts (authoring, not acquisition). PNG renders complement the SVG pieces and bring total asset surface to 237.
